name: session-secrets-guard
description: Import raw chat secrets into local storage, reuse them through aliases, and optionally scrub local resume history back to alias form.

interface.shortDescription: Import chat secrets into aliases and reuse them safely
interface.longDescription: Adds hook handlers for Codex and Claude Code that intercept raw `[[secret]]` chat placeholders, store them in local backends such as Keychain or dotenv, generate reusable aliases, and keep later agent work anchored to those aliases instead of repeating raw values.
defaultPrompt: Import a raw chat secret into a reusable local alias.
Resolve aliases from configured local backends such as env, dotenv, Keychain, 1Password, or Vault.
Keep raw secrets out of prompts, tool input, and tool output.
